OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dhiren Gadariya is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Callie Middlebrooks is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem Andrea Hartsough, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Oct. 15, 2013 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
